title: elatostema brevifolium
intro: Elatostema brevifolium, also known as Chinese water clover, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Elatostema brevifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Elatostema brevifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
